caption: The video displays a wide shot of a modern architectural complex featuring large, cylindrical, silver metallic buildings connected by a central glass entryway. A walkway with metal railings leads toward the entrance across a paved plaza. The "peoples dispatch" logo appears in the top left corner of every frame. As the video progresses, a graphic overlay emerges at the bottom of the screen. This overlay includes a circular "WORLD POLITICS" icon and a text banner that reads, "Europe's top human rights court overturns French conviction of BDS activists." There are a few distant figures visible near the building entrance, though they remain small and indistinct throughout the clip. The scene remains static in terms of camera movement, with the only changes being the appearance and slight animation of the on-screen text and graphics.
